templates.name: aiometadata
templates.title: AIOMetadata
templates.description: AIOMetadata is a next-generation, power-user-focused metadata addon for Stremio.

templates.name: aiostreams
templates.title: AIOStreams
templates.description: AIOStreams consolidates multiple Stremio addons and debrid services - including its own suite of built-in addons - into a single, highly customisable super-addon.
